falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5,200 (current level + 5% gain) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish bias and invalidate the 'HOLD' signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield rises above 5.2% (current level + 0.4%) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant increase in bond yields would indicate strong inflationary pressures, refuting the pattern's implied deflationary environment

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX Volatility Index drops below 18 (current level - 25%) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A dramatic decline in market volatility would contradict the 'blowoff' score's implication of imminent market stress

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
